question: I'm planning to visit Bandung again and I was wondering if you could remind me of the name of that restaurant in Cihampelas Walk that serves a great Nasi Goreng?

runs.response_text: The restaurant in Cihampelas Walk, Bandung, that serves a great Nasi Goreng is **Miss Bee Providore**. Enjoy your meal!
The restaurant in Cihampelas Walk that serves a great Nasi Goreng is Miss Bee Providore. Enjoy your visit and your meal!

One of the well-regarded restaurants in Cihampelas Walk that serves great Nasi Goreng is **Miss Bee Providore**. It's known for its delicious mix of Western and Indonesian cuisine, including a flavorful Nasi Goreng that you might enjoy. Be sure to check their opening hours and any possible reservations if needed. Enjoy your visit to Bandung!
